corrected_fields.summary: This source is an ECB Governing Council website index page for 'Other decisions' containing only crawl metadata (LANE: seed_crawl) and no substantive content. The page is a non-archiveable navigation listing.
corrected_fields.why_it_matters: This is a thin, non-archiveable navigation page that does not contain any actual ECB policy content. It cannot be used as a source for macro catalyst research and should be rejected per Rule 5 (listing_page prohibition).
